_note: Observed QuantumLab result for the SAME script on the SAME symbol/timeframe, captured from QL Lab Run #749 on 2026-05-25. The params below are the optimizer's best-of-583 — note rsiOB=57 differs from the TV fixture's rsiOB=60. All other params match params.json. This is the headline divergence the parity work targets.
interpretation_notes: Trade count: QL 240 vs TV 110 collapsed (220 fill rows). QL records one trade per fill (TP1 partial + runner exit), so 110 positions × ~2 fills ≈ 220 — close to QL's 240 but not identical (extra ~20 likely from end-of-test forced close or pyramiding-by-accident).
Win rate inflation (84% vs 76%): consistent with QL undercharging commission so small wins that TV records as losses-after-fees stay green in QL.
PF ratio 1.52x: same mechanism — wins look bigger and losses look smaller when commission is wrong by ~20x.
Net % ratio 2.39x: dominated by the sizing+commission interaction described in F-01.
Max DD 7.1%: way below TV's intrabar max equity drawdown — this is the F-03 close-to-close vs intrabar metric mismatch.
